title: AI Stock Euphoria: Should You Buy, Hold or Sell?
text: Are you in the AI mania? Tracey Ryniec and Andrew Rocco look at what all the fuss is about.

title: 5 Best-Performing Stocks of the Top ETF of May
text: The Spear Alpha ETF (SPRX) topped the list of the best-performing U.S. equity ETFs in May, gaining 28.3%. The rally was driven by the hype surrounding artificial intelligence (AI) and investors' flight to mega-cap tech stocks.

title: Global stock markets breathe a sigh of relief over Biden-McCarthy pact to avert U.S. debt default
text: World equities were mostly higher Monday after President Joe Biden and House Speaker Kevin McCarthy reached a final agreement on a deal to raise the U.S. debt ceiling, though the measure requires approval by Congress.

title: Markets Jump on Debt Ceiling Optimism, More Positive AI News
text: Markets gain on Friday, May 26, 2023 on optimism about debt ceiling talks, more positive AI news

title: Marvell Technology Is the Latest Tech Firm to Benefit From AI
text: Marvell Technology (MRVL) is the latest tech firm to say it is benefitting from the boom in artificial intelligence (AI), and shares skyrocketed on Friday after the company released its first-quarter earnings.

title: Marvell follows Nvidia's rally, surging 29% after chip maker cites AI as 'key growth driver'
text: Shares of Marvell Technology shot up 29% on Friday, nearing its largest ever single-day increase. The chipmaker credited AI for its upbeat second-quarter forecast.

title: Why Marvell Technology Stock Soared 29% Friday
text: Marvell Technology beat on the top and bottom lines last night. Management followed up the positive report with promises that AI revenues will double this year.

title: Marvell stock soars toward historic gains — is it the next hot AI play?
text: Is Marvell Technology Inc. the next hot artificial intelligence play? Wall Street seems to be betting on that, judging by the stock's massive Friday move.

title: Marvell shares rocket 25% on beat and 'tremendous' business potential for A.I.
text: Shares of Marvell Technology surged about 25% off the back of quarterly earnings results.

title: Marvell (MRVL) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Beat Expectations
text: Marvell's (MRVL) fiscal first-quarter performance reflects solid demand for its chip in the enterprise networking, carrier infrastructure and automotive end markets.

title: Wall Street Analysts See Marvell (MRVL) as a Buy: Should You Invest?
text: Investors often turn to recommendations made by Wall Street analysts before making a Buy, Sell, or Hold decision about a stock. While media reports about rating changes by these brokerage-firm employed (or sell-side) analysts often affect a stock's price, do they really matter?

title: The Melt-Up In Marvell Is On; But Don't Chase It Higher
text: Marvell Technology NASDAQ: MRVL started moving higher before the Q1 earnings were released because of results released by NVIDIA NASDAQ: NVDA. NVIDIA's results were down compared to last year but well above the consensus estimate and came with solid guidance.

title: Marvel Technologies stock skyrockets a day after Nvidia did the same as Wall Street clamors for semiconductors
text: Marvell Technology is the latest semiconductor company in as many days to see its shares rocket higher after the company's first-quarter results beat Street expectations on the top and bottom lines.  The chipmaker posted revenue of $1.32 billion, topping expectations of $1.3 billion, and earnings of $0.31 per share, beating estimates of $0.29 per share.

title: This Tech Stock Joins Nvidia As Analyst's Favorite After CEO Predicts AI Revenues Will 'At Least Double'
text: Investors should consider Silicon Valley chipmaker Marvell a “safer way to gain exposure to the AI wave,” one analyst said.

title: Why Is Marvell Technology (MRVL) Stock Up 17% Today?
text: Marvell Tech (NASDAQ: MRVL ) stock is soaring higher on Friday as investors react to the company's earnings report for the first quarter of 2023! Marvell Tech starts off the year strong with its adjusted earnings per share of 31 cents.

title: These 2 Nasdaq Stocks Kept the AI Rally Alive Friday
text: The Nasdaq appeared ready on Friday morning to add to its Thursday gains. Marvell Technology followed in the footsteps of fellow semiconductor manufacturers with a big share price jump following its quarterly report.

title: On the heels of Nvidia's blockbuster day, Marvell stock boosted by AI revenue expectations, while Gap rallies on surprise profit
text: Marvell Technology Inc.'s stock MRVL, +7.59% was powering 14% higher in premarket action after the chip company said it expected revenue from artificial intelligence to at least double this fiscal year.

title: AI Stocks Are on Fire. Marvell Joins Nvidia in the Hot Plays.
text: Increasing demand for generative AI is driving Marvell's network products, this analysts says.

title: Marvell Technology, Inc. (MRVL) Q1 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Marvell Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ:MRVL ) Q1 2024 Earnings Conference Call May 25, 2023 4:45 PM ET Company Participants Ashish Saran - Senior Vice President, Investor Relations Matt Murphy - President and Chief Executive Officer Willem Meintjes - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Ross Seymore - Deutsche Bank Timothy Arcuri - UBS Vivek Arya - Bank of America Securities Ambrish Srivastava - BMO Blayne Curtis - Barclays Tore Svanberg - Stifel C.J. Muse - Evercore Karl Ackerman - BNP Paribas Harlan Sur - JPMorgan Matt Ramsay - TD Cowen Srini Pajjuri - Raymond James Operator Good afternoon, and welcome to Marvell Technology Inc.'s First Quarter of Fiscal Year 2024 Earnings Conference Call.

title: Marvell (MRVL) Q1 Earnings: Taking a Look at Key Metrics Versus Estimates
text: Although the revenue and EPS for Marvell (MRVL) give a sense of how its business performed in the quarter ended April 2023, it might be worth considering how some key metrics compare with Wall Street estimates and the year-ago numbers.

title: Marvell Technology (MRVL) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
text: Marvell Technology (MRVL) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.31 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.29 per share. This compares to earnings of $0.52 per share a year ago.

title: Chipmaker Marvell Beats Estimates, Calls AI 'A Key Growth Driver'
text: Chipmaker Marvell Technology edged above Wall Street's targets for its fiscal first quarter and with the company's earnings outlook. The post Chipmaker Marvell Beats Estimates, Calls AI 'A Key Growth Driver' appeared first on Investor's Business Daily.

title: Marvell stock soars after upbeat earnings outlook, projection that AI revenue will double this year
text: Shares of Marvell Technology Inc. were soaring 15% in after-hours activity Thursday after the chip company topped expectations with its quarterly outlook and forecast that revenue related to artificial intelligence would at least double this year.

title: Marvell Technology, Inc. Reports First Quarter of Fiscal Year 2024 Financial Results
text: Q1 Net Revenue: $1.322 billion, declined by 9% year-on-year Q1 Gross Margin: 42.2% GAAP gross margin; 60.0% non-GAAP gross margin Q1 Diluted income (loss) per share: $(0.20) GAAP diluted loss per share; $0.31 non-GAAP diluted income per share SANTA CLARA, Calif. , May 25, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Marvell Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ: MRVL), a leader in data infrastructure semiconductor solutions, today reported financial results for the first quarter of fiscal year 2024.

title: 3 Semiconductor Stocks to Buy Before They Soar to New Heights in 2023
text: Semiconductor stocks are on a bull run, as demand explodes with the rapid growth of artificial intelligence applications and platforms. Investors are pouring money into semiconductor stocks at a fevered pace with the expectation that they will take us on a quantum leap forward with AI technology that includes chatbots, digital assistants and robots.

title: Earnings Previews: Costco, Gap, Marvell, Pinduoduo
text: In the first half-hour of trading on Tuesday, the Dow Jones industrials were down 0.58%, the S&P 500 down 0.67% and the Nasdaq 0.62% lower.

title: Marvell (MRVL) Q1 Earnings Coming Up: What Should You Know?
text: Marvell's (MRVL) Q1 performance is likely to have been negatively impacted by softness in its product demand as OEMs are rescheduling orders to manage excess chip inventories.

title: 7 5G Stocks to Buy for Blazing-Fast Growth
text: Fifth-generation (5G) wireless technology is igniting a digital renaissance worldwide. The sector is brimming with contenders that could potentially become juggernauts in the space.

title: Nvidia Isn't the Only Way to Play AI. The List of Possible Winners Is Long.
text: Investors are on the hunt for ways to play the artificial-intelligence software trend. Wall Street offers up a host of stocks.

title: Marvell Technology: Good Growth Prospects Ahead Make It A Buy
text: Marvell Technology has seen steady growth over the years as the semiconductor industry remains under heavy demand. The company has managed to set itself up very healthy financially which puts them ahead of many competitors.

title: New Strong Sell Stocks for May 9th
text: ARCB, MRVL and SLN have been added to the Zacks Rank #5 (Strong Sell) List on May 9, 2023.

title: Marvell Announces Changes to its Board of Directors
text: SANTA CLARA, Calif. , May 3, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Marvell Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ: MRVL), a leader in data infrastructure semiconductor solutions, today announced that the Marvell Board of Directors has appointed President and CEO, Matt Murphy as Chair of the Board, effective the date of Marvell's 2023 Annual Meeting of Stockholders which is currently scheduled for June 16, 2023.

title: Marvell Technology: A Semiconductor Powerhouse Adapting To Market Challenges
text: Marvell's diverse market presence and innovative approach make it a strong contender in the semiconductor industry. Weak FY1Q guidance raises concerns about near-term challenges, including unfavorable product mix and inventory management issues.

title: Marvell Technology, Inc. Announces Conference Call to Review First Quarter of Fiscal Year 2024 Financial Results
text: SANTA CLARA, Calif. , May 1, 2023 /PRNewswire/ --  Marvell Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ: MRVL), a leader in infrastructure semiconductor solutions, today announced it will conduct a conference call following the release of its first quarter of fiscal year 2024 financial results on Thursday, May 25, 2023, at 1:45 p.m.
